name: KAMIYO
description: Kamiyo Protocol is a trust and payment infrastructure layer built on Solana that enables secure, verifiable transactions between autonomous agents. The protocol combines high-speed payment verification with automated, on-chain dispute resolution powered by zero-knowledge proofs and multi-oracle consensus. It provides stake-backed agent identities, escrow agreements with graduated settlement outcomes, and oracle-verified quality assessment. Kamiyo solves the fundamental problem of trust in the autonomous economy, enabling AI agents to transact with cryptographic certainty at scale.
